title: Rollout Assets
description: Five independent campaign studies translating the same entertainment launch into square promo assets, preview crops, and public rollout moments.
creative_direction: Keep every image self-contained, but let the pack feel like one finished campaign toolkit spanning teaser cards, countdown assets, crop boards, and public proofs.

en.title: Rollout Assets
en.description: Five independent campaign studies translating the same entertainment launch into square promo assets, preview crops, and public rollout moments.

zh-CN.title: 宣发资产
zh-CN.description: 五张互不依赖的宣发研究图，把同一娱乐营销主题扩展为方形预热物料、裁切预览和投放场景。
